changeSet.author: tat-module
changeSet.comment: Add TAT Report as direct child of Reports menu (OGC-310)
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.menu (id, parent_id, presentation_order, element_id, action_url, display_key, is_active) SELECT nextval('clinlims.menu_seq'), (SELECT id FROM clinlims.menu WHERE element_id = 'menu_reports'), 4, 'menu_reports_tatreport', '/TATReport', 'sideNav.title.tatreport', true WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.menu WHERE element_id = 'menu_reports_tatreport' ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.menu WHERE element_id = 'menu_reports' );
